headline: How The ConocoPhillips (COP) Narrative Is Shifting On Oil Price Debates And Cash Flow Hopes
summary: ConocoPhillips’ fair value estimate has been nudged higher from US$114.74 to US$118.15 per share, a modest move of roughly 3% that fine tunes the long term price target rather than resetting the story. This tweak sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst commentary, with some research tying upside potential to higher long term oil price assumptions and free cash flow, while more cautious voices point to valuation and commodity risk. As you read on, you will see how these opposing views shape...

headline: ConocoPhillips Reshapes Portfolio As Goldman Conviction Call Meets Valuation Gap
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) plans a $2b divestiture of certain Permian Basin assets as part of a wider portfolio reshaping effort. The company is progressing with integration and synergy work following its Marathon Oil acquisition. Goldman Sachs has added ConocoPhillips to its US Conviction List, bringing additional attention from institutional investors. Recent insider share sales by senior leaders add another layer of context to the current focus on free cash flow inflection. At a share...
